---
title: "Lab 4 — First Agentic-CLI Session"
---

# Lab 4 — First Agentic-CLI Session

**Read first:** Chapters 11–14 (Terminal → CLI).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_04.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
